name: Fruit Compote Pie- Glorious Liqueurs
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crust and crimp edges. Chill at least 15 minutes.
2. In a large saucepan, combine dried apricots, peaches, nectar, and liqueur. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes. Stir in cranberries or other dried fruits.
4. Continue cooking until fruit is soft and liquid is absorbed. Remove from heat and let stand while preparing the rest of the pie.
5. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. For sour cream batter, combine sour cream, egg, sugar, flour, lemon peel, and nutmeg in a bowl. Mix well until blended.
7. Pour sour cream mixture over the fruit filling in the pie shell.
8. For crumb topping, mix flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and melted butter in a separate bowl. Add chopped pecans or walnuts and stir until combined.
9. Scatter the crumb topping evenly over the filling.
10. Bake the pie for 15 minutes at 425°F (220°C). Reduce heat to 350°F (175°C) and continue baking for 20-25 minutes, or until crumbs are golden brown and filling is almost set.
11. Serve the pie at room temperature.
